s3.bucket.versioningconfig.CfnAbout: Describes the versioning state of an Amazon S3 bucket. For more information, see [PUT Bucket versioning](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/API/RESTBucketPUTVersioningStatus.html) in the *Amazon S3 API Reference*.

s3.bucket.versioningconfig.Status.Description: The versioning state of the bucket.
